mission: Ship premium nursing exam products that convert, teach well, and accumulate reusable agent skill over time.
durableRules: chapai is the primary product repo
ccrn-agent is temporary fallback plus control-plane bridge
portable file-backed brains are canonical memory
revenue and shipping speed beat ornamental complexity
all generated questions must be original and schema-valid
every agent should load only the minimum context needed for the current task
external memory should be split into durable memory, active context, and event logs
cheap local generation should be paired with sampled QA and selective promotion
autonomous learning comes from harness design: explicit tool framing, external memory files, and tight context budgeting
every revenue-facing lane should keep one reusable asset pack and one clear next human action ready
